mission.title: Clean-room TVG value_profile implementation for issue #31
mission.objective: Implement GitHub issue #31 from current TVG state under clean-room constraints: value_profile support, default and Shaw scoped profiles, independent storyboard pilot, Image2 storyboard sheet, self-audit, and source-attribution claim ceiling.

acceptance_evidence.description: TVG docs/tests support value_profile modes, resolution, axes/gates/veto/audit prompt effects, and non-authoritative scripts.
Default practical-value profile resource and independently sourced scoped Shaw Brothers profile resource exist.
Clean-room pilot record contains original script, independent shot plan, storyboard prompt, generated storyboard sheet path, prompt/audit/iteration notes, and source attribution audit.
Existing and new tests pass, and final claims distinguish supported evidence from unverified claims.

tasks.title: Implement value_profile mechanism in TVG
tasks.mission_contribution: Required for A1 and for the pilot to use profile-specific value semantics without scripts becoming judges.

tasks.title: Create default and clean-room Shaw value profiles
tasks.mission_contribution: Required for A2 and supplies the scoped profile used by the pilot.

tasks.title: Run clean-room storyboard and Image2 pilot
tasks.mission_contribution: Required for A3: demonstrates profile-driven independent storyboard planning, image generation, and self-audit.

tasks.title: Verify tests and source-attribution claim ceiling
tasks.mission_contribution: Required for A4 and final evidence boundaries.
